faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?
faqs.answer:
Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.
Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

paragraphs: Pillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Researchadmission 2025is based on entrance exam scores. The institute offers two courses, i.e., MMS/MBA and PGDM at the PG level. To get admitted to PHIMSR, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atPillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Researchis conducted online or offline. Read the following article to know more aboutPillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Researchcourse admission2025.

PHIMSR courses' admissions are based on merit and entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forPillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Research courses:
Graduate with a 50% aggregate (45% in case of backward class candidates from Maharashtra state only)
Graduate with a 50% aggregate (45% in case of backward class candidates from Maharashtra state only)

Pillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Research admissionsare completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Pillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Research is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Pillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Research Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online/offline. Aspirants can apply online or offline. Candidates looking for online course admission can click the link here https://www.phimsr.ac.in/admissions/admission-enquiry-form/ and fill up the admission enquiry form. However, candidates looking for offline applications must reach out to the institute for more details. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website. The application fee for all the courses is INR 1,000.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute considers various entrance exam scores such as MH-CET/ATMA/MAT/CMAT/CAT, etc for admission to the MBA, MMS and PGDM courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of Pillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Research cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay thePillai Hoc Institute of Management Studies and Research feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

placement_data.title: Pillai HOC Institute of Management Studies and Research Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Pillai HOC Institute of Management Studies and Research has placement cell which is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The institute invites companies of various sectors to conduct the Campus interview process at the Campus premises. The Placement Cell organizes career guidance programmes for all students starting from the first year of induction. The final placements at Pillai HOC Institute of Management Studies are a result of simulated group discussions, personal interviews, mock aptitude tests and continuous career counselling of the students.

As per the latest report, Pillai HOC Institute of Management Studies and Research (PHIMSR) recorded 40% placement rate for the batch 2024 . As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Pillai HOC Institute of Management Studies and Research placements 2024 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA, respectively. A total of 210 recruiters visited the campus for placements and offered 210 jobs to the students of the Class 2024. The top recruiters of Pillai HOC Institute of Management Studies and Research in 2024 included Berger Paints, Del Monte, L&T, Capgemini, CCD, ITC, Swiggy, Oracle, Reliance , etc

Earlier, Pillai HOC Institute of Management Studies and Research recorded 69% placement for the batch 2023. The highest and average package offered during Pillai HOC Institute of Management Studies and Research placements 2023 stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. A total of 73 recruiters visited the campus for placements in 2023, and placed 47 students of the batch 2023.

review_content.Placements: The placement was good compared to the last year. Only 5% of the students got placed in that year, but that's not mean that the college didn't bring the good companies. hostel_campus.college_name: Bhabha Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The teachers provide good support to academically weak students.
reviews.review_text: All facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are available. The quality of the food served is average, and all the facilities are average in the hostel. The computer room is available for 24 hours, and the Wi-Fi facility is also available for 24 hours. Sports, games and canteen are also available 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average, but the faculty is highly qualified. The college provides 50% placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully BSNL Wi-Fi enabled. The library is the best. Classrooms are not digital and not air-conditioned. Management is very strict about college fees and mess charges. Hostel facility is secure with a literate warden.

reviews.review_heading: This campus used to be good earlier.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus environment is good and peaceful. The campus is spacious and green. The college also has a huge playground, and we also have a 5-storey academic building. All the floors have very large classrooms and labs. The EC lab is equipped with huge machinery, and we also have lab assistants to help us in labs.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but not very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. The college provides free Wi-Fi to the students. Regarding water purifier and food quality, I will not recommend any student to take admission in this college. Sometimes, the filter runs a year. The overall infrastructure is average. The students will feel bored after taking admission. The college library is good for reading books. They don't provide good library and ACs and good environment as per the college fees collected from the students.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with food, technical knowledge and bad placements for previous and our batches.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was not much good, but it was average. Proper ventilation was not provided. There were not separate labs for all subjects. Wi-Fi was not provided on the college campus. Sports ground was only for boys, not for girls. Food quality was the worst.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good but the area is backward and there is nothing outside the college.
reviews.review_text: When I joined the college, it was under making, so it was not too good at that time. But the campus area is really large, and almost everything is available on campus. There is nothing to see outside the college as it is in a rural area. When I left college, it was good, and they are doing changes in the infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is not available everywhere, it was only available in the hostel, but there is no speed.

reviews.review_heading: Bhabha Institute of Technology - A college to say to say no to.
reviews.review_text: They don't have electricity supply, they rely on generators and they cut power supply 2 times for several hours daily. Very far from the city. No outings allowed. Getting leave is a very lengthy and painful process. No coolers allowed to students. Students get slapped and beaten for poor reasons. Wi-fi very slow. Poor medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has the best infrastructure, good Wi-Fi and campus, and everything is best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the classrooms are the best with air-conditioning. There are hostel room facilities with study rooms. Extra classes are conducted from 9 to 12 only in Bhabha night class, and college class period is from 9 am to 4 pm. The medical facilities are the best, and sports and games are available. There is a gym with many equipments, and the canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Bhabha, the jail of engineers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very bad. There is no any air-condition in classrooms. There are six computer labs but they hardly open for students. Only, the 1st-year hostel is in good condition. From 2nd to 4th year, there are no facilities in the hostel. Plywoods are used for room separation. In every room, about 5 students are filled whereas in the 1st year, only 3 students. Only two water coolers for 160 rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of management and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is in bad condition just like government colleges and high schools. Wi-Fi is available but only for seniors student, just for 2 hours in a day. Labs are open only for university practical exams.
In the library, the senior students were restricted to get entry, only for the first-year students. Medical facilities are available but only 1 tablet at a time, low prices, repeated tablets for every illness, poor effort and services are provided. You can play every sport, but kits wi...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a step to success.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. It seems to be on 60 acres. A good college infrastructure with labs and all facilities. Its far from the city, so there is a better facility for the hostel for a reasonable fee. Infrastructure includes a cafeteria, gym, and playground. Overall, it's average.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, but I would not recommend it to anyone.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not good. I would like to say, when I entered the class, it was very bad. There was no mat even. The hostel for the first year students is somewhat good. There is no auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: The college was good but had compromised with the food.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good in my college. There are separate labs for all streams of engineering. The classrooms are with air ventilation. Zym, a sports field for all games, sports room for the indoor game, dispensary 24*7, library 24*7 with high-speed Wi-Fi are available in this college. The college was good in all aspects.

reviews.review_heading: The best teaching experience from faculty and a total security of the students.
reviews.review_text: As we know, all the engineering college buildings and infrastructure are too good, but in Bhabha Institute of Technology, it is in general. The college building and structure are too good, and the environment of the college is safe and secure. There is a separate hostel for both the girls and boys. You should not be alone at all the time, and really I hope you enjoy your B.Tech life. In my opinion, if you want to study B.Tech continuously, then you should join this college. It is really helpful ...

reviews.review_heading: Not good in terms of technical education.
reviews.review_text:
The campus is very big but not arranged. A hostel facility is there with classes and everything. But if you going to compare with professional college, it has a bad infrastructure.
I think they should try to manage these all things in a better way.
The canteen of the campus is very bad and they don't serve quality food.
I think there should be a proper structure of the classrooms.

review_content.Placements: The college provides great opportunities for aspirants. review_summary.college_name: Sri Mittapalli Institute of Technology for Women (SMITW) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's a very nice college to study and improve your knowledge.

content.Placements: In my college, we are having wonderful placement opportunities. The average salary per annum offered is 3.5 Lacs. The college is good for improving, you can focus on self-study a lot here. Placements wise, it's a very nice college.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, we are having wonderful and so many opportunities to create and set our career goal. We are having the best hostel facilities and labs. Classrooms are a platform to learn new things in my career, they were very nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA. The minimum salary package offered ranges from 1.5 LPA to 4.5 LPA. Capgemini, TCS, Infosys, Verzeo, Skill Vertex, Microsoft, and IBM are the top recruiting companies. The roles offered are general manager, assistant manager, software engineer, director, and designer.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the laboratory is available. This college provides a girls' hostel, and it is very helpful to long-distance girls. The quality of food is very good. Medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college environment is awesome, peaceful air and good infrastructure is available.

content.Placements: Above 70% of students will get placements at our college. Infosys, Tech Mahindra, TCS, Wipro, and a lot of local companies visit our college for placements. This college provides you with the course you need. All lectures will help you to get the course you wanted. We can also have internships with reputed companies and get certificates too.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has air-conditioned labs and neat classrooms. We got an all-rounder library where we read books daily. We have a hostel with full security for women. Quality food is available in our college. One can also enjoy the canteen food. You can play in the water if you like to play. We have a dance club, sports club, and music club.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good placements and infrastructure, but it has poor hostel infrastructure.

content.Placements: Above 80% of the students got placed from our college. Top recruiting companies are IBM and Savantis. Roles offered are associate system engineer and system analyst. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.4 LPA. About 50% of the members completed internships and they are highly recommendable.
content.Infrastructure: It has a good infrastructure and I loved it. They serve very delicious food. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are held in our college the most. We have a good and simple library. There is a good atmosphere on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good environment, and it is pollution-free, and the faculty are also very helpful.

content.Placements: No other courses were offered in our college. Almost 80% of the students are from the CSE branch in our college. The salary packages offered in our course are low because we are freshers. Different types of roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. The quality of the food available in the mess, canteen, etc., are also good. Sports and games are conducted every week. A medical facility is also available. Many more events are also conducted in college itself only.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, N.C. College of Engineering offers a diverse range of progammes. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Okay. Not upto the mark as compared to fee structure.

review_content.Placements: The placement in 2016 was fine. There were a number of placements as well. The top-notch was the Infosys. It took around 80 students from the batch of 2016. After that, the placements from the campus became an illusion.
review_content.Infrastructure: The dependency on the investments of a college is directly proportational to the number of admission. Till 2012 the admission rate was as good as the number of seats available. After that the poor admissions resulted in the deterioration of facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Physics - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of N.C. College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: No placements opportunities are offered for applied sciences courses. Placements are provided only for engineering courses. Placements offered are much better than those of other colleges. However, our faculty are not much educated, and they have less experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good enough, but the condition of the classrooms is not good. Toilets are not hygienic. The parks are also not properly maintained, and the condition of benches are also not good. However, the library is good enough.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely disappointed due to lack of placements in 2021.

content.Placements: For now, there are no placements provided due to COVID. Most of the companies denied to visit here. Before Covid, many good companies and organisations used to visit here for their requirements. Right now, no companies are approaching the college and students are searching jobs on their own.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi is provided to the students but it can be improved. Hostel is currently closed for the students of engineering, it is only provided for the faculty members living there. Food was good when I was in first year, after that the mess was closed for all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Made a few new friends whom are around to this day. The quality is awesome.

content.Placements: I was offered the opportunity to intern at BSNL for which I was extremely grateful. The placements were not great, there were a few companies visiting the campus but most of them were hiring CS and IT students. The salaries were low and were not comparable to the minimum offered in colleges across the country. Some of my friends got selected and grew after they passed out from the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college is big and great with all the latest facilities available. The classrooms are big. The library is big too. The sports fields are vast and most of the students spend much time around the area preparing for tournaments. The quality of food available in the canteen is great with a maggi being the favourite for many students. The building is great and you can see it from far. The garden outside is well maintained too. Many students spend time around the area.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Okay. Not upto the mark as compared to fee structure.

content.Placements: The placement in 2016 was fine. There were a number of placements as well. The top-notch was the Infosys. It took around 80 students from the batch of 2016. After that, the placements from the campus became an illusion.
content.Infrastructure: The dependency on the investments of a college is directly proportational to the number of admission. Till 2012 the admission rate was as good as the number of seats available. After that the poor admissions resulted in the deterioration of facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Physics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of N.C. College of Engineering.

content.Placements: No placements opportunities are offered for applied sciences courses. Placements are provided only for engineering courses. Placements offered are much better than those of other colleges. However, our faculty are not much educated, and they have less experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good enough, but the condition of the classrooms is not good. Toilets are not hygienic. The parks are also not properly maintained, and the condition of benches are also not good. However, the library is good enough.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is an institute with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. The placement record is quite good as far as engineering courses are concerned. Many good companies like Infosys, Genpact, Tech Mahindra, etc., visited the campus to recruit the students. But, only a few companies visited for BBA course.
